summary: Verified Site Monitor feature in Growth Panel. All backend APIs (GET/POST /growth/monitors, POST /growth/monitors/:id/check, DELETE /growth/monitors/:id) working correctly with proper auth. Frontend shows Pages/Monitors tab toggle, Monitor button on page detail view, monitor detail view with checks count, last checked date, and re-check button. Dashboard UI verified: no 'Self-Builder Active' badge, pill-style tabs (Projects, Core System, + New Project), no broken tab bar.

monitors_api.POST_monitors_create: PASS - creates monitor with url, id, checks=0, enabled=true
monitors_api.POST_monitors_duplicate: PASS - returns already_exists=true for duplicate URL
monitors_api.DELETE_monitors: PASS - deletes monitor and returns success=true
monitors_api.POST_monitors_check: PASS - triggers re-crawl, increments checks, sets last_checked_at, returns changes and counter_moves arrays
monitors_api.POST_monitors_validation: PASS - returns 400 when url is missing

growth_panel_sidebar_tabs.details: Pages and Monitors tab toggle present with correct styling

monitors_tab_empty_state.details: Shows 'No monitors yet' empty state when no monitors exist

page_detail_monitor_button.details: Green 'Monitor' button visible in top-right corner of page detail view
page_detail_monitor_button.button_style: background: rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.06); border: 1px solid rgba(52, 211, 153, 0.15); color: rgb(52, 211, 153)

monitor_button_adds_to_monitors.details: Clicking Monitor button adds page to monitors and switches to Monitors tab

elements_verified: Last checked date or 'Ready to check' state

dashboard_no_self_builder_badge.details: No 'Self-Builder Active' badge visible on dashboard

dashboard_pill_style_tabs.details: Navigation shows pill-style tabs: Projects, Core System, + New Project

dashboard_no_broken_tab_bar.details: No visible 'x' delete buttons by default (appear on hover only)

critical_code_review_comments: monitorDb in service.js correctly implements addMonitor, getMonitors, getMonitor, updateMonitorCheck, deleteMonitor, toggleMonitor
Monitor API routes properly check auth and allowlist before operations
Monitor check endpoint correctly re-crawls URL, compares with baseline, and generates counter-move suggestions
GrowthPanel.jsx correctly implements sidebarTab toggle between 'pages' and 'monitors'
Monitor button in page detail view has correct green styling and switches to Monitors tab on click
seed_data_creation: Created test monitors during API testing (cleaned up after tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 verified the Site Monitor feature in Growth Panel. All monitor CRUD APIs work correctly with Supabase auth. The frontend correctly shows Pages/Monitors tab toggle, Monitor button on page detail, and monitor detail view with re-check functionality. Dashboard UI is clean with pill-style tabs and no Self-Builder badge.
